sources.name: EmpleoVino (E-commerce/Digital)
sources.notes: Wine-sector digital roles. Watch for expired/covered postings and internships.

sources.name: EnoJobsOnline (Spain)
sources.notes: Wine-sector roles in Spain. Many non-product roles; rely on ranking to filter.

sources.name: Chelsea & Co Careers
sources.notes: Drinks digital agency, Barcelona/hybrid. Low volume, high interest.

sources.name: cOnO Consultores by Casula
sources.notes: Teamtailor board. Food/beverage/wine + commercial roles in Spain.

sources.name: VinoEmpleo (digital search)
sources.notes: Search results may be sparse; cookie overlays may interfere.

sources.name: Founderful (Senior PM, remote/hybrid)
sources.notes: Startup/scaleup PM roles. Likely powered by 'Consider' job platform; check for API.

sources.name: Pearson (remote Product Management)
sources.notes: Large company; filter hard by relevance and Spain/remote eligibility.

sources.name: Merck Group (product search)
sources.notes: Dynamic results; may include non-PM product roles.

sources.name: Vodafone Spain (Product Management)
sources.notes: Eightfold-powered. Dynamic, anti-bot risk. Stretch source after stable ones work.
